raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N kad ta Kehninne
no Sabas Salamanza
Slawu dsirdeja / tad
nahze ta ar warren leelu Speh-
ku uhs Jerusalemi/ ir ar Kanee-
teem/ kas Rwehpja-Sahles un
dauds Selta un dahrgus Akmi-
nus neffe/ Salamanu ar Mih-
lahm kahrdinaht : Un kad ta pee
Salamanza nahze/ tad runnaja
ta ar to wiſſu/ ko winna sawá
Sirđi btj apzehmuſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Salamans stahstija
winnał wiſſus winnas Wahr-
dus/ ne kahda Lecta bija Sala-
manam paſlehpta/ ko wiꞥsch tai
ne buhtu stahstijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu ta Kehninne no
Sabas redseja Salamanza Gud-
ribu/ un to Namnu / ko wiꞥsch
bij darrijs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Galda Barri-
bu/ un winna Kalpir Dsihwok-
us/ un winnu Sullainu Amat-
tu/ un winnu Drehbes/ un win-
na Dschreena-Dewejus/ un win-
nu Drehbes/ un winna usei-
jamn Weetu/ fur wiꞥsch us ta
KUNGA Namnu gabje / tad
winna tik ne bes Dwaschas pa-
lite.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet winna fazzisa us to
Kehninu; Tas irr teefi/ ko es fa-
wá Semmê eſmu dsirdejsi nota-
wahin Leetahin / un no tawas
Gudribas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es ne eſmu winna
Wahrdeim tizzeiski / kamehr es
patti nahkusi/ un mannas Azzis
to redsejtchas/ un rangi/ man ne
irr puſs tik dauds no tawas lee-
las Gudribas fluddinahts/ pee
tewis irr twirak/ ne ka ta Sla-
wa/ ko es eſmu dsirdejsi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Swehtigi irr tawi Kan-
dis/ un swehtigi irr fchee tawi
Kalpi / kas weenumehr tawá
Preekscha stahw/ un tawn Gud-
ribu klausa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Slawehts lai irr tas
KIINGStawsDeews/kam labs
Prahts pee tewis btjis/ ka winšch
tew us fawu Gohda-Krehsln
tam KUNGAM tawam Dec-
wam par Kehninu fehdinatu.
Tas irr tapehz/ ka taws Deews
Israëlu mihto/ to paſchu muh-
schigi gribbedams ustaisiht / ta-
pehz irr wiꞥsch tew pahr teem
par Kehninu eezehts/ ka tew
buhs Teeju un Taifnibu pa-
darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta dewe tam Kehni-
ram ſints un diwidefinits Ta-
lentus Selta/ un Rwehpja-Sah-
les/ un dahrgus Akminus leela
Pulká/ un tik labbas Sahles ne
bija ka fchihs/ ko ta Kehntzinne
no Sabas tam Kehninam Sa-
lamanam dewe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta patt arridsan Urama
Ooooo 2
Kalpi/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
